channel.title: Comments for page "Old Business"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Old Business"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"-provided you offer Wondertainment exclusive vending rights to all abnormal confections purveyed at your Circus for a period of no less than 50 years."

Hm. Considering the events of Oh, I Wouldn't Worry About Flaky-Os, I'm guessing they weaselled out of the exclusivity requirements, but this is now canonically how The Circus got its petting zoo.

I'm also super psyched that another author portrayed Darke as I portray him. Well done!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'm not 100% sure what's going on here, but this time it's in that good way where I look forward to learning.

Wondertainment is as fun as ever, and the interactions were great.

Can't wait for the next chapter, +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I doubt I really have to say it, but…

I am unbelievably excited. This! Is going to be awesome!!

(Oh, and for those who don't quite know how this makes sense in the canon, all will be explained in good time, I've seen the plot synopsis >:3)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I did it mum I started a series

Immense thanks to DarkStuff, without whom this would still be mouldering in my sandbox never to see the light of day, and anybody else who looked it over before I posted. Stay tuned for part 2, which will be posted… once I have written it. I've got a half finished SCP, two vague outlines, a scrapped draft, an epilogue, and an intermission so far — make of that what you will. In any case, I invite you to join me on this wonderful journey of figuring out how the heck to write a story longer than a single page.

I'm starting again. Sorry about that; long-form narrative is really tricky for me, so writing this is an uphill battle. The first part (i.e. the replacement for this) is completed, and I'm not going to post it until I've got at least another one done.

Sorry.
